ddls:
CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name of the destination */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the destination is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the destination */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the destination */,
  "visited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the destination has been visited */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the destination */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the destination */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the destination based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES destination_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destinations_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "itineraries" (
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each itinerary */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the itinerary */,
  "itinerary_name" TEXT /* Name of the itinerary */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the itinerary */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the itinerary */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the itinerary (planned, in-progress, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the itinerary */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the itinerary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the itinerary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itinerary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_itineraries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "itinerary_destinations" (
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the itinerary */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date the destination is to be visited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("itinerary_id", "destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, travel agent, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Travel agency the agent works for */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the travel agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the travel agent */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the travel agent's office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the travel agent's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the travel agent's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "itinerary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the itinerary being booked */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel agent managing the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (pending, paid, failed) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_itinerary_id FOREIGN KEY ("itinerary_id") REFERENCES itineraries ("itinerary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES travel_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destination_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the destination type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destination_type_associations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., budget, activity) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., low, high, adventure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date the destination was visited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the travel history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the travel history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destination_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_destination_images_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)
